database_name.description: Database in which the service is created.

schema_name.description: Schema in which the service is created.

service_status.description: The current status of the service.

instance_id.description: ID of the service instance (this is the index of the service instance starting from 0).

status.description: The current status of the service instance.

spec_digest.description: The unique and immutable identifier that represents the service specification content.

creation_time.description: The time when Snowflake started creating the service instance.

start_time.description: The time when Snowflake acknowledged the service instance is running on a node.
